text.title: file-reference-passing Decision Tree
text.summary: Choose the right ref-passing shape for your pipeline.

decision-tree.root-question: Does more than ~1K tokens of content currently cross a stage boundary in this pipeline?

branch.conclusion: No refactor needed; current shape is fine.

branch.question: What is the source of the content that needs to cross the boundary?

branch.conclusion: Scan-then-load: stage 1 returns refs from a manifest enum; stage 2 reads by path.
Subagent+refs: subagent returns `{summary, interesting_refs, follow_up_questions}`; parent re-reads on demand.
Recursive descent: each step picks one child node; refs flow in and out of each level.
Snapshot first, then any of the above patterns over the snapshot store.
